notes: Hierarchical intent schema: domain -> intent. Used for two-stage NLU classification (domain router, then fine-grained intent classifier). Each intent lists required_slots for dialogue state management and guardrail_notes flagging anything that must never be handled by free-text LLM generation alone.

domains.description: Queries and actions related to the customer's own account information and settings.

intents.description: Customer wants to know current account balance or available funds.
intents.guardrail_notes: Read-only. Requires authenticated session before disclosure.
example_utterances: what's my account balance
how much money do I have right now
check balance please
mera balance kitna hai
can u tell me available balance in savings
balance check karo
how much is left in my account
show me current balance
need to know my balance urgently
whats the balance in my salary account
balance dikhao
available funds in my account?

intents.description: Customer wants an account statement for a period, format, or purpose.
intents.guardrail_notes: Read-only, authenticated.
example_utterances: send me last 3 months statement
I need my bank statement for visa application
download statement for last year
statement chahiye pichle 6 mahine ka
can you email me my april statement
need account statement in pdf
how do I get a statement for tax filing
give me statement from jan to march 2026
mujhe statement bhejo email pe
annual statement request
statement for loan application needed
last 10 transactions statement

intents.description: Customer wants to update KYC documents, PAN, address proof, or identity details.
intents.guardrail_notes: Sensitive identity change. Must route to verified document upload flow, never accept KYC data as plain chat text. Requires OTP/video-KYC step-up.
example_utterances: I need to update my KYC
how to update pan card in bank account
kyc update karna hai
my aadhar has changed need to update
update my identity documents
re-kyc process kaise hoga
need to submit new address proof
how do I complete video kyc
my kyc is expired what do I do
change registered pan number
kyc documents update karna hai online
need help with periodic kyc renewal

intents.description: Customer wants to block, freeze, or report a lost/stolen debit or credit card.
intents.guardrail_notes: Time-sensitive and security-critical. Must be handled via authenticated instant tool call, never delayed for confirmation loops. Auto-escalate if fraud suspected.
example_utterances: please block my debit card immediately
i lost my card can u stop it
card chori ho gaya, block kardo
block my credit card right now
someone stole my wallet block all cards
my card is missing please freeze it
need to permanently block lost card
temporarily freeze my debit card
card khoya hai jaldi block karo
block card ending 4521
unblock my card I found it
my card is stuck in atm please block

intents.description: Customer wants to update their registered communication or permanent address.
intents.guardrail_notes: Requires OTP/document verification step-up before applying.
example_utterances: I want to change my registered address
update my communication address
address change karna hai naya ghar shift hua
how to update address in bank records
moved to a new city need to update address
please update my permanent address
change delivery address for cheque book
my pin code has changed update please
address update ke liye kya documents chahiye
shifted house update bank address

intents.description: Customer wants to close their account or a specific product.
intents.guardrail_notes: High-friction intent. Must route to retention flow then human agent; never auto-processed by the bot alone.
example_utterances: I want to close my account
how do I close my savings account
account band karna hai
please deactivate my account permanently
not happy with service want to close account
closing account moving to another bank
cancel my account and cards
how long does account closure take
want to shut down my nexbank account
account close karne ka process kya hai

domains.description: Queries and disputes about specific past or pending transactions.

intents.description: Customer claims a transaction was made without their authorization (potential fraud).
intents.guardrail_notes: High priority fraud signal. Must trigger auto-escalation and provisional card freeze offer; never resolved purely by chatbot reassurance.
example_utterances: I didn't make this transaction, someone used my card
there's a charge I never authorized
ye transaction maine nahi kiya fraud hai
unknown transaction of 5000 rupees on my account
my card was used without my permission
I see a payment I never made
this is unauthorized please reverse it
someone hacked my account and made a payment
fraud transaction on my statement need help
I never shopped there but there's a charge
block and refund this fraud transaction
unrecognized debit from my account

intents.description: Customer was charged twice for what should have been a single transaction.
intents.guardrail_notes: Verify against ledger before promising refund; do not confirm refund amount without tool confirmation.
example_utterances: I got charged twice for one purchase
double payment hua hai please check
same amount deducted two times
duplicate transaction on my account
I paid once but it shows two debits
amazon charged me twice for same order
two identical transactions same day please refund one
money deducted twice for one recharge
duplicate debit of 1200 rupees
why was I billed two times for the same thing

intents.description: Customer sent/received money but the credit did not reflect (failed transfer, refund not credited).
intents.guardrail_notes: Route to transaction reconciliation tool; do not guess resolution timelines beyond documented SLA.
example_utterances: money debited but not credited to receiver
sent money but friend didn't get it
refund not received yet from merchant
payment failed but amount deducted from my account
neft transfer stuck money not credited
amount cut but transaction failed on app
refund initiated 5 days ago still not in my account
upi payment failed but money gone
cashback not credited as promised
salary not credited this month

intents.description: Customer wants to check the status of an already-initiated refund or dispute.
intents.guardrail_notes: Read-only status lookup.
example_utterances: what's the status of my refund
when will I get my refund
refund kab tak aayega
check status of my dispute ticket
any update on my complaint filed last week
how long does a refund usually take
tracking my chargeback status
is my refund approved yet
refund status for ticket number 88214

intents.description: Customer asks about a transaction shown as pending/processing.
intents.guardrail_notes: Read-only.
example_utterances: why is this transaction still pending
transaction showing processing since yesterday
pending payment not cleared yet
how long do pending transactions take to clear
this debit is still in pending state
payment stuck in processing

intents.description: Customer's transaction failed and they want to understand why or confirm reversal.
intents.guardrail_notes: Read-only; do not speculate on technical cause without tool lookup.
example_utterances: my transaction failed why
payment declined at merchant but why
transaction failed will I get my money back automatically
atm withdrawal failed but card was debited
upi transaction failed reason
why did my bill payment fail

domains.description: Product discovery, comparison, and recommendation requests.

intents.description: Customer wants suggestions on savings account types or features.
intents.guardrail_notes: General product info only; must include T&C disclaimer, no guaranteed-return language.
example_utterances: which savings account is best for me
do you have a high interest savings account
best savings account for students
savings account with zero balance option
which account gives more interest
recommend a savings account for salary credit
kaunsa savings account acha rahega mere liye

intents.description: Customer wants information on loan products suited to their needs.
intents.guardrail_notes: Must not quote personalized interest rate or eligibility without underwriting tool; disclaim that final terms depend on credit assessment.
example_utterances: I need a personal loan for wedding
what home loan options do you have
looking for education loan for my daughter
best loan for buying a car
which loan has lowest interest rate
personal loan chahiye emergency ke liye
loan against fixed deposit available?

intents.description: Customer wants a credit or debit card recommendation based on lifestyle/spend.
intents.guardrail_notes: General comparison only, no guaranteed approval promises.
example_utterances: which credit card is best for travel
suggest a card with good cashback
I shop online a lot which card suits me
best credit card for fuel savings
which card has lowest annual fee
recommend a card for first time users

intents.description: Customer inquires about or is offered insurance products linked to banking.
intents.guardrail_notes: Must include mandatory insurance disclosures; never present as investment advice.
example_utterances: do you offer health insurance
tell me about term insurance plans
is there travel insurance with my card
insurance policy for home loan customers
life insurance options through nexbank

intents.description: Customer wants FD tenure/rate options.
intents.guardrail_notes: Rates must come from live rate tool, never hardcoded/guessed by the LLM.
example_utterances: what are current fd interest rates
best tenure for fixed deposit
fd karna hai 1 lakh ka kitna interest milega
senior citizen fd rates
tax saving fd options

domains.description: Dissatisfaction, service issues, and formal complaints.

intents.description: General dissatisfaction with service quality, staff behavior, or process delays.
intents.guardrail_notes: Sentiment-monitored; repeated negative sentiment is an escalation trigger.
example_utterances: your customer service is terrible
I've been waiting for 2 weeks with no update
branch staff was very rude to me
nobody is responding to my emails
this is the worst banking experience
bahut bura service hai aapka
I want to file a formal complaint

intents.description: Customer disputes or complains about a fee/charge deducted.
intents.guardrail_notes: Verify fee against fee schedule tool before agreeing to reverse.
example_utterances: why was I charged annual fee I never agreed to
unnecessary charges on my account
please waive this penalty charge
why is there a maintenance fee deducted
hidden charges on my statement
atm withdrawal charge is too high

intents.description: Customer reports a technical issue with the mobile app or website.
intents.guardrail_notes: Route to tech support queue; do not attempt to diagnose security-related bugs conversationally.
example_utterances: the app keeps crashing when I login
unable to see my transactions in the app
website is not loading properly
otp not received on app
app bahut slow chal raha hai
getting an error while making payment on app

intents.description: Customer reports suspected fraud, phishing, or account compromise beyond a single transaction.
intents.guardrail_notes: Always auto-escalate to fraud team; never resolved by bot alone regardless of confidence.
example_utterances: I think my account has been hacked
I got a phishing call pretending to be nexbank
someone is trying to access my account
I shared my otp by mistake with a fraud caller
my account details got leaked what do I do
suspicious login alert on my account

domains.description: Rate/tax/investment-adjacent questions that must be handled with disclaimers, never as personalized advice.

intents.description: Customer asks about current interest rates on products.
intents.guardrail_notes: Must pull from live rate tool; disclaim rates are subject to change.
example_utterances: what is the current savings interest rate
fd rates today
home loan interest rate kya hai abhi
repo rate se meri emi kaise change hogi
current rate of interest on personal loan

intents.description: Customer asks tax-related questions connected to their banking products.
intents.guardrail_notes: Must never give personalized tax advice. Always route to disclaimer plus suggestion to consult a tax professional or CA.
example_utterances: is fd interest taxable
how much tds is deducted on my fd
will I have to pay tax on savings interest
tax saving options in banking
do I need to file itr for this income

intents.description: Customer asks for investment guidance (mutual funds, stocks, etc.) beyond simple bank products.
intents.guardrail_notes: Must never give personalized investment advice or recommend specific instruments. Always disclaim and offer to connect with a licensed advisor.
example_utterances: should I invest in mutual funds or fd
is this a good time to invest in stocks
which mutual fund should I buy
how should I invest my savings for best returns
investment advice chahiye mujhe

domains.description: Conversation-management and system-level intents that aren't domain-specific banking requests.

intents.description: Customer explicitly asks to speak with a human agent.
intents.guardrail_notes: Always honored; never argued with or delayed by the bot.
example_utterances: connect me to a human agent
I want to talk to a real person
transfer this call to customer care executive
stop the bot I need a human
mujhe agent se baat karni hai

intents.description: Opening greeting with no specific request yet.
intents.guardrail_notes: None.
example_utterances: hi
hello
good morning
namaste
hey there

intents.description: Customer ending the conversation.
intents.guardrail_notes: Trigger CSAT survey prompt on farewell.
example_utterances: thanks bye
that's all thank you
ok got it thanks
dhanyawad
no further questions bye

intents.description: System-level intent for login/OTP/identity verification steps within the conversation.
intents.guardrail_notes: Never bypassed; required before any account-specific data disclosure or action.
example_utterances: my otp is 483920
here is my registered mobile number
I want to verify my identity
resend otp please
otp nahi aaya dobara bhejo
